column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="gentle smile and a modest nod" | TEXT="承知いたしました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="looking happy with hands on cheeks" | TEXT="喜んで" P3: ACTION/PROPS="bowing gracefully" | TEXT="かしこまりました" P4: ACTION/PROPS="raising a fan slightly" | TEXT="お任せください" P5: ACTION/PROPS="clapping hands together happily" | TEXT="楽しみですね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="giving a clear affirmative nod" | TEXT="もちろんですよ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="standing straight with confidence" | TEXT="心得ました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="looking cheerful with an open umbrella" | TEXT="良いお返事です" P9: ACTION/PROPS="tilting head with a wink" | TEXT="どうぞお進めください"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="writing a message on a card" | TEXT="お引き受けします" P2: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small jewel box" | TEXT="大切にいたします" P3: ACTION/PROPS="looking out from a window with hope" | TEXT="待ち遠しいです" P4: ACTION/PROPS="softly nodding while sipping tea" | TEXT="同意いたします" P5: ACTION/PROPS="pointing to herself with a smile" | TEXT="私でよろしければ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="stepping forward gracefully" | TEXT="参りますわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="gently closing her eyes" | TEXT="望むところです" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a traditional folding fan" | TEXT="準備万端です" P9: ACTION/PROPS="smiling behind her hand" | TEXT="うれしいお誘いです"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="carrying a lantern" | TEXT="ご一緒しても？" P2: ACTION/PROPS="offering her hand" | TEXT="手を取り合いましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="nodding with a sparkling gaze" | TEXT="ぜひに" P4: ACTION/PROPS="sitting neatly and nodding" | TEXT="約束いたします" P5: ACTION/PROPS="drawing a circle in the air" | TEXT="賛成です" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking up at the stars with a nod" | TEXT="未来へ向かいましょう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="holding a cherry blossom petal" | TEXT="運命を感じます" P8: ACTION/PROPS="placing a hand on a trunk" | TEXT="旅立ちましょう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="looking determined but soft" | TEXT="やり遂げます"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="holding a bunch of flowers" | TEXT="受け取ります" P2: ACTION/PROPS="nodding and smiling at a pet" | TEXT="仲良くしましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="standing in a garden of iris" | TEXT="美しくありたいですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="looking back and smiling" | TEXT="ついて行きます" P5: ACTION/PROPS="offering a cushion" | TEXT="お座りください" P6: ACTION/PROPS="smiling from a boat" | TEXT="出発です" P7: ACTION/PROPS="nodding under the autumn moon" | TEXT="風情がありますね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a Japanese parasol" | TEXT="どこまでも" P9: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a bright face" | TEXT="賛成ですとも"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="leaning on a shoulder gently" | TEXT="頼りにしてます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="giving a small salute" | TEXT="了解しました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="nodding with a warm heart" | TEXT="心が温まります" P4: ACTION/PROPS="holding a glass of sake" | TEXT="祝杯をあげましょう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="smiling by a pond" | TEXT="和を大切に" P6: ACTION/PROPS="clasping hands in prayer" | TEXT="願いを込めて" P7: ACTION/PROPS="nodding towards a bridge" | TEXT="共に渡りましょう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="holding a silk cloth" | TEXT="丁寧に包みます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="looking bright and cheery" | TEXT="お安い御用です"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="smiling amidst hydrangea" | TEXT="雨もまた良いですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="nodding while viewing a play" | TEXT="感銘を受けました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="holding a bell" | TEXT="合図を待ちます" P4: ACTION/PROPS="looking elegant in a festival" | TEXT="参加しましょう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="shaking hands with two hands" | TEXT="固く結びましょう" P6: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a calm gaze" | TEXT="委ねますわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="nodding while looking at a scroll" | TEXT="その通りに" P8: ACTION/PROPS="standing beside a stone lantern" | TEXT="道標になります" P9: ACTION/PROPS="gracefully sitting down" | TEXT="覚悟しております"
